description: Test cases for ExprNode missing required 'args' field

test_cases.name: has_op_no_args
test_cases.description: Object with op but no args field

test_cases.name: args_wrong_type
test_cases.description: args field must be array type

test_cases.name: args_object_not_array
test_cases.expected_error: ExprNode 'args' field must be array, not object

test_cases.name: args_number_not_array
test_cases.expected_error: ExprNode 'args' field must be array, not number
